segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with an energetic, upbeat background music accompanying a montage of playful scenes, including a person in a blue costume posing dynamically and a man with glasses smiling. The man, who introduces himself as RJ, states, "What's popping vlog. It's your boy RJ, your favorite boy RJ, your favorite person on this entire channel RJ," as he speaks to the camera on a dock beside a large cruise ship. He reveals his prank, telling his siblings they were going to Long Beach, then excitedly asks, "Guess where we're going!" His siblings, a woman in a white crop top and another in a blue top, react with surprised exclamations of "This is a cruise!" and playful teasing about him saying "beach." RJ clarifies they are going "from Long Beach to Ensenada, Mexico," which is met with an excited "This is crazy! You're actually the best brother ever!" and a grateful "Thank you Royal Caribbean!" as they board the ship. Inside a modern cabin, the woman in the white crop top excitedly exclaims "Okay guys, we just entered our room," and "Woah!!!" as she explores, adding "I could get used to this," and "It's nice," before putting on a white 'Ovation of the Seas' bucket hat and shouting "Woah, we got a balcony!" and "We got little hats!" The group celebrates the start of their vacation, with the woman in white declaring "Vacation started!" and mentioning, "RJ and Cory are a floor below us, so we have to split up a little. Hey, we need some girl time. I'm hungry." This leads to a quick cut to them enjoying pizza and drinks in a brightly lit dining area, where the woman in white, stating "Me and Keno are so freaking hungry," pulls a string of cheese from her slice, amidst sounds of eating and joyful chatter.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with the Woman in white crop top exclaiming, "Oh, this lobster got a dumpy!" with a surprised expression, as a male voice playfully calls her "Ariel." The Woman in blue top then confirms the meal's deliciousness with a satisfied "Yum," while another male voice declares it "good ass lobster." The scene transitions to the Cruise Ship deck at sunset, where the Woman in white crop top excitedly announces, "Okay, we took off," and a male voice adds, "We're leaving!" The group waves, with the Woman in blue top playfully asking, "Who are you waving to?" and the Woman in white crop top responding, "You're so hallucinating." RJ, in his beige cardigan, waves and explains, "Bro, we're reversing what grandpa did," adding that he's on vacation because he "partied hard for my birthday." The Woman in white crop top then addresses someone as "Court," noting they look "ready for adventure." As the group walks along the deck, the Woman in white crop top playfully gestures and explains that taking Dramamine for motion sickness made them "drowsy," feeling "kind of drunk." A male voice comments, "These girls are cooked," and the Woman in blue top, making a funny face, expresses her need for "a piña colada" to wake her up, which a male voice playfully questions. At the bar, the Woman in white crop top sips a pink drink and celebrates, "Got our first drink," mentioning they "waited, I think, 25 minutes at the bar," while RJ jokes about taking his shirt off. Upbeat background music plays as the scene transitions to the modern Cabin Interior, where the Woman in white crop top, now in a white knit sweater, dances and excitedly declares, "It's officially our first day on the ship! We're gonna hit all the activities the ship has to offer." She then gives a hint and lets out a loud, sustained, high-pitched scream of excitement, met with a "Whoa!" from a male voice, perfectly capturing the group's high energy and anticipation for their journey.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment begins with a black screen displaying 'first up on the agenda...' before cutting to a bright, overexposed shot of the Male Friend in Bucket Hat reacting with surprise. The scene then transitions to a transparent glass capsule on a cruise ship deck, where the Woman in white crop top, now in a white knit sweater and jeans, enters with the Male Friend in Bucket Hat. Inside, RJ, a man with dark hair and round black glasses, holds a phone and smiles. A male voice announces, "I want to give you guys a heart attack. So we're going up there," followed by excited exclamations like "We're going up!" and "Wow!" as they head to the rock climbing wall, marked by on-screen text 'activity #2: rock climbing'. The Woman in white crop top, identified as Kina, states, "I have no upper body strength, so this is going to be a little embarrassing," before she begins climbing, assisted by an instructor, with a male voice joking, "And only two feet up." The Male Friend in Bucket Hat, referred to as Jaylen and Corey, follows, climbing with determination as others cheer, "Jaylen's going first!" and "Way to go, Jay!" and later, "Corey's already passing her." Kina reaches the top and descends, expressing exhaustion with the on-screen caption 'That was really tiring.' and her voice confirming, "That was really tiring." RJ, now in a blue plaid shirt, watches with a strained expression, commenting, "Yeah, you're crazy, bro, you're crazy." Kina then climbs again, guided by the instructor, with cheers of "Go Kina!" and "Kina, you're going quite fast!" The Male Friend (Jaylen/Corey) is asked, "Do a little pre-interview, how do you feel?" to which he replies, "I feel like Spiderman. Feeling extra sticky today." The bright, open-air setting with the ocean visible in the background, along with enthusiastic shouts and background music, maintains an energetic and adventurous atmosphere, with on-screen text 'foreshadowing' adding a playful note.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a dynamic outdoor rock climbing scene on a cruise ship deck, where the Woman in white crop top, cheered on as "Kina," and the Male Friend in Bucket Hat are actively scaling the Rock Climbing Wall, both secured with safety harnesses and ropes. Enthusiastic shouts of "Go RJ!" and "Go Kina!" fill the air as Kina climbs with focus, while the Male Friend in Bucket Hat follows closely behind, both navigating colorful handholds on the geometrically patterned wall. A staff member supervises from below, and the Cruise Ship’s structure, including railings and a large panda decoration, frames the scene. After descending, the Male Friend in Bucket Hat expresses his fear and excitement, stating, "I'm like shaking a little bit. I was kinda scared," and "That was awesome. I looked at the ocean, I was shitting bricks," before celebrating with a wide smile and flexing his arms. The camera then shifts to a close-up of RJ, now in a blue plaid shirt, laughing and reacting to the climb. He is later seen with Kina, now in a beige knit top, as they walk along the deck, engaging in playful banter about Kina's "beautiful name," with comments like "everyone has been saying you have a great name." The scene transitions to the iFly indoor skydiving simulator, introduced by an announcer stating, "Now we're gonna go onto this iFly simulator." RJ describes it as "this little tube thing," while another voice adds, "Exactly how you're gonna look, bro." The group, including RJ, Kina, and others, are suited up in blue jumpsuits and helmets, with one person expressing apprehension, "Scared!" and another asking "Why?" before stating, "Everyone watching you lose aura." Inside the glass-enclosed wind tunnel, RJ floats with arms outstretched, guided by an instructor, amidst the whooshing sounds of the wind tunnel and a driving background music. Onlookers watch from outside, and on-screen text labels participants as 'RJ', 'kina', 'cory', and 'jalin', indicating a group activity. The atmosphere is energetic and adventurous, with the ocean visible in the background and the iFly branding prominently displayed.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with Jalin, Cory, Kina, and RJ in blue jumpsuits and helmets, floating weightlessly inside the iFly simulator, with their names displayed on screen. The scene then shifts to a brightly lit, modern bumper car arena where a female voice exclaims, "Look at these cars lined up!" A male voice, likely RJ, expresses surprise, "I can't believe this is like right here in the middle of the ocean, bro." The Woman in white crop top, now in a beige knit top, excitedly claims, "This is my car!" as she navigates a red bumper car, laughing and shouting. She playfully warns, "I'm coming after you!" while another male voice responds, "I owe you." She notes, "You can't even hear him, but this guy's yelling at me!" as a male voice yells, "I'm coming for you! Kina, get over here!" followed by an exclamation of "Ah!" Upbeat electronic music kicks in as the chaotic fun continues. RJ, in a white t-shirt, is also in a red car, smiling and interacting, while the Woman in blue top, now in a white lace top, playfully engages from her yellow car. Voices exclaim, "I'm coming for you, bro!" and "Cory's going down!" as the group enjoys dynamic collisions. The Woman in white crop top mentions, "Me and Cory might be able to go again," and a male voice, likely RJ, directs, "Brad, you gotta get her little bitch ass sister now." Another male voice adds, "I told her to get RJ, but we're actually gonna get her." Amidst laughter and shouts, the Woman in white crop top reflects, "Me and Cory might have gone a little too crazy on bumper cars." She then plans, "In like 30 minutes, we're gonna get ready to have some sushi," adding, "Worked up quite an appetite." The segment concludes with the group exiting the arena, the Woman in white crop top and RJ walking together, and the Woman in blue top making a playful face to the camera, as a male voice sings, "Girls night!" and the Woman in white crop top states, "This is why I wanted to come," with the upbeat music continuing, highlighting their energetic and fun-filled experience.

RJ explains, "We just poured it at Intanado Mexico," and that they're "scheduled for a day of fun in the sun." They then arrive at a dock, greeted by a Tour Guide who says, "Good morning!" The woman playfully exclaims, "Ola, bitches," and announces, "Going on a tour," adding, "Let's do it!" The group, now wearing helmets, walks toward a rocky hillside, with the woman expressing excitement and noting, "They said a little hike." Throughout, background music plays, transitioning from the cozy, well-lit restaurant to a bright, open outdoor environment.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a woman, initially in a white helmet and t-shirt, expressing excitement with an audible "We're losing so much aura 'cause we're leading this" as she gazes at a scenic mountainous landscape under a bright blue sky. segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a bright, sunny outdoor vineyard setting with wooden structures and scenic hills, where RJ, a man with dark hair, glasses, and a checkered shirt, speaks directly to the camera in a calm, conversational voice about a pet turtle. He is then joined by a lively group, including Kina, a woman with long dark hair in a white bucket hat and white t-shirt, who disputes his turtle story with an excited voice, saying, "No, I think you made that up in your head. It just ran away." The group moves to a wooden table under a large woven umbrella, where they are presented with a unique tequila tasting platter featuring citrus, chocolate, spices, and a dried grasshopper. Kina, expressing surprise and curiosity, exclaims, "We're boarding this ship! Whoa! I've always wanted to be on a ship," and questions, "I've never had tequila with all these things. This is literally the grasshopper, I think?" As they engage in the tasting, dipping fingers into salt and licking the grasshopper, Kina comments on the "quality" being "more apparent." RJ playfully asks, "Wait, are you gonna chug that, Kina? 35% alcohol," and Kina explains the tradition of "seeing the cross." Another woman, in a white lace top, makes a playful face and is heard saying, "I don't want to disrespect." Shots are taken with a clink, and RJ exclaims, "Kina with the 48!" and "She's a Mexican!" as Kina finishes her shot, prompting RJ to declare, "She did the whole thing!" and playfully warn, "Kina, don't drink anymore." The group shares a moment of camaraderie, with RJ asking, "Are you guys all siblings?" and exclaiming, "That's lit! Cheers!" as he and Kina raise their glasses. RJ then finishes his shot, stating, "I'm finishing it off for the grasshopper," and describes the taste, noting, "There's that grasshopper, then I'm also tasting it like a raisin," amidst animated reactions and laughter.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a close-up of a beautifully plated dish, likely a tuna tartare or seared tuna, garnished with avocado, herbs, and shredded cheese, drizzled with olive oil, as a male voice exclaims, "Beef carpaccio, show, show, I'm drunk." The camera then shifts to a man with dark hair and round glasses, wearing a black shirt, who excitedly shares that the fish was caught fresh in the Mexican harbor today, stating, "My boy said they straight up caught this in the Mexican harbor today. These are Mexican shrimp." He reacts with wide-eyed enthusiasm, exclaiming 'Oh god for real' after a female voice says "I think he was joking," to which he insists, "No, he said straight up, dead ass, on God for real, my guy." He mentions having "lobster bisque" while a woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top and a pendant necklace, adds that she has "tuna tartare." The man playfully rephrases his order as "Lobster bisque, more like lobster bitch," then takes a bite, declaring it "so freaking good" amidst background chatter and lively music. The woman is also seen eating, cutting into a steak, and reacting with delight, exclaiming, "That’s the softest piece of meat I’ve ever had." The man continues to eat, commenting on his "wagyu filet mignon" and saying "Oh yeah, that's what I've been eating all day," later adding, "The damage is done, guys. Damage is done." A female voice, possibly the woman, tells someone, "Archi, put it down." The camera pans to show a nearly empty plate, indicating the meal is nearly finished. The atmosphere is lively and upscale, with dim lighting, chandeliers, and other diners in the background, suggesting a fine dining restaurant setting where a waiter in a white shirt and black vest is briefly visible serving another table. The group appears to be enjoying a luxurious dining experience, with wine glasses and elegant table settings enhancing the ambiance.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a dimly lit, upscale restaurant where the Man in black hoodie, seated and gesturing, smiles at the camera, recounting how he insisted on no dessert unless cheesecake was available, then excitedly shares that the restaurant indeed offered a "delicious cheesecake." The camera pans to a beautifully garnished slice of cheesecake, as he laughs, claiming "they added it to the menu" for him, while another voice mistakenly identifies "a lot of apples" in what is then corrected as "apple pie." The Woman in black top is then shown cutting into a tender steak, expressing amazement, while the Man with dark hair and glasses reacts excitedly. The Woman in black top expresses surprise, "I didn't know you like cheesecake like that," to which the Man in black hoodie replies, "I love cheesecake." He then sings "Concrete jungle," explaining it's because it's a "New York cheesecake." After dinner, the group walks through a well-lit hallway adorned with artwork, laughing and reflecting on their meal. The Woman in black top exclaims, "That dinner was so freaking crazy," and another voice agrees it was "a good one to end it on." She adds, "I'm so full," and others chime in with "Oh my god, I can't breathe," and "Guys, I'm never eating again," concluding they "ate too good." The scene shifts to a hotel room where the Woman in black top, now in a camouflage cap and navy blue sweatshirt, appears tired. She explains that she and "Pina" had planned to party but "literally just fell asleep." Standing by a window overlooking a port, she confirms they are "back at the port, back in LA," noting the "gloomy ass weather." Finally, she sits in the cabin, smiling amidst a cluttered desk and blue wall, reflecting that "this cruise was so freaking fun" and encouraging viewers, "If you guys ever get the chance to go on a cruise, go with your friends."

segments.integrated_caption: The Woman in black top, now wearing a camouflage cap and navy blue sweatshirt, speaks directly to the camera in a hotel room, enthusiastically reflecting on her cruise experience. She describes it as 'rejuvenating' and 'exhausting' in a positive way, noting how different it is as an adult compared to her last cruise at age ten. She exclaims, "What a fat cruise, you guys!" and feels 'cultured, exposed, rejuvenated, high off of life, slay vacation.' The scene then transitions to a different room where she is joined by the Man with dark hair, wearing a black t-shirt with a 'Warner Bros. Pictures Inc.' logo. They sit together, smiling and laughing as they reflect on the trip. The woman admits, "I totally thought I had an outro, but turns out I didn't even do one on the boat," to which the man playfully interjects, "Silly girl!" and they both laugh. He adds that the trip was "a movie, man," and that he "just played all day, all day every day for three days straight." The woman thanks viewers for watching, expressing hope they enjoyed the Ensenada cruise experience, and they both wave goodbye with cheerful farewells, saying, "We love you and we'll see you in the next video. Bye!" The video ends with a blue screen displaying 'THX FOR WATCHING!!' and 'LOVE U ALL <3', set against a cozy, warmly lit background with framed artwork and plants.
